chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1387 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (priority) 1. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 2. For hearing of CMA No.5346/2022 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 28.02.2024 Mr. Abdul Naeem Pirzada, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General Sindh along with Shafi Muhammad Bullo, Deputy Director on behalf of Director School Education (Primary), Sukkur and Dilawar Soomro, Focal Person of District Education Officer (Primary), Ghotki @ Mirpur Mathelo..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- In compliance of order dated 19.09.2023, original offer order for the post of Chowkidar (BPS-1) is given to the petitioner; a copy of which has been brought on record through a statement / compliance report. Since compliance has been made, the petition is accordingly disposed of along with listed application. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
